positive: A mystical, geometric woodland animal scene. The main subject is a stylized, silhouetted fox peering through overgrown, bioluminescent foliage. The background features delicate, interconnected lines forming constellations and geometric patterns (sacred geometry). Include stylized flora like oversized ferns and glowing mushroom clusters. The style should be ethereal, whimsical, and detailed, resembling Art Nouveau mixed with contemporary celestial/botanical etching. Color palette: deep midnight blues, emerald greens, antique gold, and soft lavender accents. Lighting should be dramatic and directional, using high contrast to emphasize the silhouettes and glowing elements. Composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, optimized for repeat pattern tiling or a central apparel print. Ink bleed and crisp edges are essential.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, lowres, poor detail, cartoon, graffiti, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, realistic photograph, messy, cluttered, grainy, signature
